texto: We don’t have to be fast
autor: we simply have to be steady and move in the right direction. Direction is always going to trump speed.
explicacao: Orientação direta de we simply have to be steady and move in the right direction. Direction is always going to trump speed. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “We don’t have to be fast” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, toni-sorenson, útil em momentos de reflexao.
